entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic focus of the study on sustainable crop production.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The practice of producing crops in a way that maintains environmental health and resource availability.

entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in soil quality affecting agricultural productivity.

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources for crop production.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: The occurrence of shifts in climate patterns over time.

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: The distribution and timing of precipitation.

entities.name: CROP WATER STRESS
entities.description: The physiological stress in crops due to insufficient water.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Areas characterized by low annual rainfall and high evaporation rates.

entities.name: FOOD GRAINS
entities.description: Cereal crops produced to meet the nutritional needs of the population.

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water accessible for agricultural and human use.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism to improve crops.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of biological processes to develop stress-tolerant crop varieties.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to maintain productivity under adverse environmental conditions.

entities.name: LANDSCAPE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The physical and environmental characteristics of a specific area.

entities.name: SYSTEMS APPROACH
entities.description: A holistic methodology integrating multiple factors to improve agricultural resilience.

entities.name: LANDSCAPE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The strategic management of land resources for sustainability.

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCEMENTS
entities.description: Improvements in crop genetics to enhance performance and resilience.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems to withstand and recover from environmental stresses.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The efficient and sustainable use of land and water resources.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESSES
entities.description: External pressures such as climate change and resource depletion.
